name: 2pk Glass Soap Dispensers Amber - Threshold™
description:
Fill your bathroom counter with chic style with this 2-Pack of Glass Soap Dispensers from Threshold™. This pack includes two glass soap pumps, both featuring an easy-to-use pump for dispensing the right amount of liquid soap, body wash, shampoo or lotion on to your palms. Showcasing a classic cylindrical silhouette, they feature a dark amber hue with a black dispenser to complement a variety of decor styles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
